project: Preset signature -- diagramme technique style whiteboard premium, faux-handmade controle, palette semantique restreinte, pedagogie visuelle argumentative
language_convention: FR pour les meta-descriptions et notes d'usage, EN pour les tokens injectables dans les prompts IA

quick_spec.description: Spec rapide en 1 page -- tout ce qu'il faut pour reproduire le style sans lire le reste

typography.title: 28-36px, handwritten bold (Virgil/Caveat), centered, dark gray
typography.label: 16-20px, handwritten regular, colored by semantic role
typography.annotation: 12-14px, handwritten light, dark gray, near arrows

quick_spec.golden_rule: Chaque couleur = un sens. Pas de couleur decorative.

style_weight.usage: En cas de conflit entre regles, la priorite descend de critical vers flexible. Le critical definit l'ADN whiteboard-sketch -- sans ces elements, ce n'est plus ce preset. La signature est le faux-handmade controle : propre et maitrise mais jamais geometriquement parfait.

style.genre_description: Controlled hand-drawn whiteboard style for technical diagrams and educational infographics. Mimics marker on whiteboard or pen on paper -- but clean, deliberate, never actually rough. The imperfection is aesthetic, not sloppy. Closest digital references: Excalidraw, tldraw, Whimsical sketch mode. The visual language is argumentative: every element encodes a point in a demonstration, not just decoration.
style.positioning: entre croquis de tableau blanc, schema product design, infographie explicative simplifiee et demonstration technique rendue chaleureuse

priority_hierarchy.rule: La hierarchie visuelle et la lisibilite du message sont sacrees -- chaque element doit etre compris en 2 secondes
Chaque couleur porte un sens. Aucune couleur decorative. Le style est argumentatif, pas ornemental
Rendu conforme au prompt_core -- hand-drawn controle, jamais vector sharp ni corporate polish
Respiration, whitespace genereux, flux de lecture naturel haut-bas ou gauche-droite

linework: controlled hand-drawn lines with deliberate slight imperfection -- faux-handmade, never actually rough
rounded corners on ALL shapes -- no sharp angles, no pointed corners
variable line weight suggesting confident marker or felt-tip pen
contour dark gray-black (#4A4A4A to #5A5A5A), never pure black (#000)
slightly thinner contours for secondary elements, thicker for primary containers
color: warm off-white background (#F3F3F3 to #F6F6F6) with very subtle paper grain texture
soft muted gray fills for neutral containers and structural elements (#D8DCE0 to #E2E5E8)
semantic color accents: each color MUST carry functional meaning, never decorative
all accents desaturated and pastel -- never neon, never fully saturated
maximum 4-5 distinct colors per image including gray
shading: flat fills only -- absolutely no gradients inside shapes
no drop shadows, no glow effects, no volumetric light
very subtle paper texture on background providing the only depth
extremely faint depth suggestion through slight tone variation between foreground and background elements
typography: handwritten-style rounded casual typeface throughout -- Virgil, Caveat, Patrick Hand aesthetic
title: large, confident, centered, dark gray to black
section labels: medium size, colored according to semantic role (red/green)
annotations: small, dark gray, placed near arrows or connectors
metrics/KPI: medium, centered inside colored badge/capsule shapes
never condensed, never ultra-bold, never serif, never sans-serif corporate

components.description: Vocabulaire de composants reutilisables. Chaque diagramme est assemble a partir de ce kit restreint -- pas d'elements ad hoc.

system_card.description: Rectangle arrondi representant un acteur, outil ou point d'entree
system_card.style: rounded rectangle, light gray fill, dark contour, centered handwritten label
system_card.usage: designate an agent, tool, system or entry point

data_container.description: Grand rectangle arrondi contenant des petits rectangles internes -- represente un ensemble/corpus/systeme
data_container.style: large rounded rectangle with light gray fill, containing repeated small rounded rectangles in slightly darker gray
data_container.usage: represent a database, codebase, file collection, or complex system

optimized_subset.description: Conteneur en pointilles legers avec un bloc colore interne -- represente une selection/filtrage
optimized_subset.style: dashed light gray border, inside: smaller solid container with green or accent fill, fewer internal blocks
optimized_subset.usage: represent a filtered set, minimal selection, optimized subset

metric_badge.description: Capsule/pilule coloree affichant un KPI ou une metrique cle
metric_badge.style: rounded capsule shape, tinted fill matching semantic color, centered handwritten number and label
metric_badge.usage: highlight a key metric, count, score, or measurement

conclusion_banner.description: Rectangle arrondi large en bas du diagramme -- le takeaway principal
conclusion_banner.style: wide rounded rectangle, blue tinted fill, centered handwritten synthesis text
conclusion_banner.usage: key insight, final takeaway, summary statement -- always at bottom of diagram

decision_node.description: Losange representant un noeud de decision, traitement ou structure intermediaire
decision_node.style: diamond/rhombus shape, purple or accent fill, centered label
decision_node.usage: decision point, processing node, intermediate mechanism

flow_arrow.description: Fleche verticale ou horizontale simple avec annotation optionnelle
flow_arrow.style: hand-drawn arrow with slight curve, dark gray, annotation text in smaller handwriting alongside
flow_arrow.usage: causal relationship, data flow, process direction

section_separator.description: Ligne pointillee verticale ou horizontale separant des sections logiques
section_separator.style: dashed light gray line, very subtle

framing: structured layout with clear visual hierarchy driven by size and position
title centered at top, conclusion banner anchored at bottom
comparison layouts use vertical separator (dashed line) between columns
vertical narrative flow within each section: agent -> process -> data -> metrics
spatial_design: extremely generous whitespace -- the void is pedagogical, it teaches by separating
elements float with breathing room, never packed or compressed
implicit grid alignment but with hand-drawn looseness
arrows and connectors always labeled when they represent a named operation

camera.default: flat orthographic, straight-on view, no perspective

detail_density.focal: clear labels, readable metrics, distinct shapes
detail_density.background: empty off-white space -- the whiteboard itself

complexity.simple: single flow or concept with 3-5 elements -- maximum clarity
complexity.balanced: comparison or multi-step with 6-12 elements -- sweet spot
complexity.rich: full system diagram with 12-20 elements -- still breathable, never cluttered

comparison.description: Two columns side by side: problem (left) vs solution (right), separated by dashed vertical line, conclusion banner at bottom
comparison.structure: title | [left column: label + flow] | separator | [right column: label + flow] | conclusion banner
comparison.color_mapping: left column accents in red (problem), right column accents in green (solution), conclusion in blue

vertical_flow.description: Single column top-to-bottom process: input -> steps -> output
vertical_flow.structure: title | system_card (input) | arrow | process steps | arrow | result | metric_badge
vertical_flow.color_mapping: neutral gray for process, green for successful outputs, red for error branches

architecture.structure: title | system_cards connected by labeled arrows | data_containers for storage layers | metric_badges for KPIs
architecture.color_mapping: gray for infrastructure, purple for decision/processing nodes, blue for highlights

step_by_step.structure: title | numbered system_cards in vertical sequence | arrows between each | annotation alongside | conclusion
step_by_step.color_mapping: green for completed steps, gray for future steps, blue for current/active step

matrix.structure: title | row/column headers | cells as system_cards with varying fills | summary row or banner
matrix.color_mapping: semantic fill per cell based on status/quality

subject_logic.default_type: technical diagrams, process flows, comparisons, architecture schemas, concept explanations
allowed_forms: flowcharts and process diagrams with causal arrows
architecture diagrams with labeled interconnected components
data flow visualizations with direction indicators
concept maps and mind maps with hierarchy
KPI dashboards as simple metric badge collections

metaphor_vocabulary.files / code units: repeated small rounded rectangles inside a container

types: warm off-white surface with subtle paper or whiteboard grain
clean light background suggesting a physical writing surface
rules: background always warm off-white, never pure white, never dark
texture very subtle -- paper grain at 5-10% opacity, never distracting
no decorative elements outside the diagram content
the background IS the whiteboard -- it provides context through absence

color_policy.dominant: warm off-white background (#F3F3F3 to #F6F6F6), soft gray structural elements (#D8DCE0 to #E2E5E8)

conclusion.description: soft sky blue, sustained but gentle

neutral_tones.contour: #4A4A4A to #5A5A5A -- dark gray, never pure black
neutral_tones.fill: #D8DCE0 to #E2E5E8 -- soft cool gray for containers

rules: every color instance must carry semantic meaning -- no decorative color
gray is always neutral/structural, never carries positive or negative meaning
only one accent color per logical section -- no rainbow within a single block
accents always desaturated and pastel, never neon or fully saturated

mood.brand_voice: intelligent but accessible, technical but human, expert without arrogance, pedagogical without infantilization, innovative without aggressive futurism

avoid: 3D rendering, isometric, perspective depth, glassmorphism, neumorphism
drop shadows, glow effects, gradients, volumetric light
sharp vector precision -- too clean kills the sketch feel
anime, cartoon, comic book, concept art
pure black (#000) or pure white (#FFF) -- always off-tones
prompt_core: Hand-drawn whiteboard sketch technical diagram, controlled marker-pen aesthetic with deliberate slight imperfection, warm off-white textured paper background, soft rounded shapes with dark gray contours, muted gray containers, semantic pastel color accents (coral red for problems, mint green for solutions, sky blue for conclusions, lavender for mechanisms), handwritten casual typography, generous pedagogical whitespace, clean argumentative visual hierarchy, 4:3.
compressed_inference_prompt: Whiteboard sketch diagram, hand-drawn marker style, off-white paper, rounded gray containers, semantic color accents red green blue purple, handwritten labels, generous whitespace, 4:3.
negative_short: photorealism, 3D rendering, corporate infographic, dark background, neon colors, sharp vector, polished digital, gradient, drop shadow, anime
negative_usage: negative_short (10 termes) pour Midjourney et moteurs avec limite de tokens. negative_core.flat_string (15 termes) pour SDXL, Flux et moteurs sans contrainte de longueur.

negative_core.flat_string: photorealism, 3D rendering, corporate infographic, PowerPoint, anime, cartoon, neon colors, dark background, heavy gradients, cluttered layout, sharp vector, polished digital, drop shadow, glow effect, material design

visual_signature: controlled hand-drawn imperfection -- faux-handmade, never sloppy
semantic color coding where every hue carries functional meaning

signature.seed_phrase: Technical whiteboard diagram drawn with confident controlled marker strokes on warm textured paper, where imperfection is deliberate aesthetic not sloppiness, color is never decorative but always argumentative, and whitespace teaches as much as the shapes it separates.
signature.manifesto: A warm whiteboard where complex systems become clear through simple shapes, semantic colors, and breathing room. Every diagram is an argument rendered in marker pen.

marks.geometry: rounded rectangles and soft organic shapes assembled from a reusable component kit, never sharp corners, connectors as hand-drawn arrows with optional annotations
marks.light: flat even ambient lighting with no directional source, paper grain texture provides the only depth, no shadows no glow
marks.composition: structured comparison or vertical flow layout, title at top and conclusion banner at bottom, generous breathing room between every element, implicit grid with hand-drawn looseness

signature.tyrannical_rule: Every color in the image must carry semantic meaning. Gray is neutral/container, red is problem/cost, green is solution/benefit, blue is conclusion/insight, purple is mechanism/structure. No decorative color allowed. If an element has color, it makes a point.

invariants: warm off-white background with paper grain
hand-drawn rounded shapes with controlled imperfection
conclusion banner at bottom when applicable
variables: specific accent colors used (not all 4 are required per image)

strict_mode.when: serie visuelle coherente, branding tech blog, documentation produit
strict_mode.rules: prompt_core integral, tous les composants du kit, palette hex precise, conclusion banner obligatoire

relaxed_mode.when: illustration editoriale ponctuelle, post LinkedIn, schema one-shot
allowed: composants ad hoc hors du kit
accent colors plus satures si le sujet l'exige
pas de conclusion banner si le diagramme est auto-explicatif

templates.comparison: [problem] vs [solution] comparison diagram, two columns separated by dashed line, [prompt_core], left column with red problem accents, right column with green solution accents, blue conclusion banner at bottom summarizing the insight
templates.vertical_flow: [process] vertical flow diagram, [prompt_core], system cards connected by annotated arrows flowing top to bottom, metric badges highlighting key measurements, neutral gray process with green success indicators
templates.architecture: [system] architecture diagram, [prompt_core], interconnected system cards with labeled flow arrows, data containers for storage, purple decision nodes, blue highlight on focal component
templates.step_by_step: [process] step-by-step explanation, [prompt_core], numbered stages in vertical sequence with annotated arrows, green progression indicators, blue conclusion at bottom

example_prompts.token_optimization_comparison: Token optimization comparison diagram, two columns on warm off-white paper: left column 'Without Graph' showing Claude Code system card with arrow labeled 'reads everything' to large gray container filled with many small file blocks labeled 'Entire Codebase' and red metric badge '13,205 tokens' below, right column 'With Graph' showing Claude Code card with arrow labeled 'queries graph' to a small purple network of five connected nodes with thin lines between them labeled 'Graph' then arrow labeled 'blast radius' to small green container with only five blocks inside labeled 'Minimal Review Set' and green metric badge '1,928 tokens' below, columns separated by dashed gray vertical line, wide blue conclusion banner anchored at bottom reading '6.8x fewer tokens + higher review quality', hand-drawn whiteboard sketch style with controlled marker-pen imperfection, rounded shapes, handwritten casual typography, generous whitespace, 4:3.
example_prompts.ci_cd_pipeline_flow: CI/CD deployment pipeline vertical flow diagram on warm off-white paper, system cards for 'Developer', 'Git Push', 'CI Server' connected by annotated hand-drawn arrows, purple diamond decision node 'Tests Pass?' with green arrow to 'Deploy' and red arrow to 'Fix', green metric badge '99.2% uptime' at bottom, blue conclusion banner 'Automated deploys reduce errors by 4x', hand-drawn whiteboard sketch style, rounded shapes, semantic color accents, handwritten labels, generous whitespace, 4:3.
example_prompts.microservices_architecture: Microservices architecture diagram on warm off-white paper, five gray system cards (Auth, API Gateway, Users, Orders, Payments) connected by labeled hand-drawn arrows showing request flow, large dashed data container 'Database Cluster' at bottom with three small internal blocks, purple diamond 'Load Balancer' at top distributing traffic, green metric badges for response times, hand-drawn whiteboard sketch style, controlled imperfection, semantic colors, generous whitespace, 16:9.
example_prompts.before_after_refactoring: Code refactoring comparison diagram on warm off-white paper, left column 'Before' with tangled arrows between six gray system cards showing spaghetti dependencies and red metric badge 'Coupling: 87%', right column 'After' with clean layered architecture three cards with clear arrows and green metric badge 'Coupling: 23%', dashed vertical separator, blue conclusion banner 'Clean architecture reduces bug rate by 60%', hand-drawn whiteboard sketch style, rounded shapes, handwritten typography, 4:3.

nano_banana_2.strategy: 5-bloc, insister sur sketch et hand-drawn, formulations positives pour exclure le corporate polish
nano_banana_2.risks: texte: eleve (handwritten text lisible tres difficile a obtenir) | contour: modere (imperfection controlee difficile a doser) | layout: modere (structure spatiale peut etre ignoree)
nano_banana_2.tip: prompt_core en bloc 3. Ne PAS demander de texte lisible dans l'image -- utiliser des blocs placeholder avec des formes suggerant du texte. Insister sur 'warm off-white background' pour eviter le fond blanc pur. Decrire les formes plutot que les labels.

qwen_image_2.strategy: 7 regles, sujet en tete, negative prompt explicite, meilleur support texte
qwen_image_2.risks: texte: modere (meilleur rendu que Nano) | layout: faible (bon respect de la structure) | style: modere (peut tirer vers le vector propre)
qwen_image_2.tip: flat_string en champ negatif. Specifier 'hand-drawn sketch style NOT vector NOT digital' pour eviter la derive vers le propre. Ajouter 'marker pen aesthetic with slight imperfection' pour ancrer le faux-handmade.

sdxl_flux.strategy: prompt lineaire dense, negative prompt, bon rendu de textures papier
sdxl_flux.risks: texte: eleve | style: modere (peut aller vers l'illustration polie)
sdxl_flux.tip: compressed_inference_prompt + composition. (hand-drawn:1.2), (whiteboard sketch:1.1), (polished digital:-0.5). Le grain papier est un point fort de SDXL.

midjourney.strategy: prompt compact, --no flag, attention a la derive illustrative
midjourney.risks: style: eleve (MJ a tendance a polir et embellir, incompatible avec le sketch) | texte: eleve
midjourney.tip: compressed_inference_prompt + --ar 4:3 --s 250 --c 30. Stylize BAS (250) pour eviter l'embellissement. Ajouter 'rough sketch, marker pen, whiteboard' dans le prompt et 'polished, digital art, illustration' dans --no.

quality_checks: controlled hand-drawn imperfection present in linework (faux-handmade, not sloppy, not vector-clean)
warm off-white background with paper grain visible
all shapes rounded, contours dark gray (see quick_spec.colors)
every colored element carries semantic meaning (see quick_spec.golden_rule)
maximum 4-5 colors total, generous whitespace between ALL sections
clear visual hierarchy: title > labels > components > annotations (see quick_spec.typography)
conclusion or takeaway visually distinct at bottom
diagram tells a story with clear narrative direction
